zh.Köln, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany: 德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可爾
zh.Heusden, Asten, North Brabant, Netherlan: 荷蘭努-布拉班特阿斯特斯登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jan van Heusden於大約1220年出生在荷蘭努-布拉班特斯登時，他的父親Arnoud II heer van Heusden26歲，母親Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg19歲。他與Aleidis van Arenberg結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1268年10月14日在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可爾享年49歲。

zh-hans.Köln, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany: 德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可爾
zh-hans.Heusden, Asten, North Brabant, Netherlan: 荷兰努-布拉班特阿斯特斯登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jan van Heusden于大约1220年出生在荷兰努-布拉班特斯登时，他的父亲Arnoud II heer van Heusden26岁，母亲Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg19岁。他与Aleidis van Arenberg结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1268年10月14日在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可爾享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Heusden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ousden (Suffolk) with prosthetic initial H-. The placename derives from Old English ūf ‘owl’ (genitive ūfes) + denu ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Jan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jan van Heusden was born about 1220, in Heusden, North Brabant, Netherlands, his father, Arnoud II heer van Heusden, was 26 and his mother, Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg, was 19. He married Aleidis van Arenberg. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 14 October 1268, in Köln, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jan van Heusden est né environ 1220, à Heusden, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, son père, Arnoud II heer van Heusden, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Aleidis van Arenberg. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 14 octobre 1268, à Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jan van Heusden um 1220 in Heusden, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Arnoud II heer van Heusden 26 und seine Mutter Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg 19. Er hat Aleidis van Arenberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Oktober 1268 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland.

it.Heusden, Asten, North Brabant, Netherlan: Heusden, Asten, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi
it.lifeSummary: Quando Jan van Heusden è nato il circa 1220 nel Heusden, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Arnoud II heer van Heusden, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Aleidis van Arenberg. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 14 ottobre 1268, nel Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jan van Heusdenが約1220年にオランダノオルド-ブラバントヘウスデンで生まれた時，父Arnoud II heer van Heusdenは26歳，母Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsbergは19歳であった。Aleidis van Arenbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1268年10月14日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクoルンで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jan van Heusden(이)가 대략 1220년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 헤우즈든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arnoud II heer van Heusden(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Aleidis van Arenberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1268년 10월 14일 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 ko에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Heusden, Asten, North Brabant, Netherlan: Heusden, Asten, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.Heusden, North Brabant, Netherlands: Heusden, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jan van Heusden nasceu aproximadamente 1220, em Heusden, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Arnoud II heer van Heusden, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Aleidis van Arenberg. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de outubro de 1268, em Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, com 49 anos.

ro.Heusden, Asten, North Brabant, Netherlan: Heusden, Asten, Noord-Brabant, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jan van Heusden родился около 1220 г. в местности хеусден, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Arnoud II heer van Heusden было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Aleidis van Arenberg. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 14 октября 1268 г. в местности кoлн, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 49 лет.

es.Heusden, Asten, North Brabant, Netherlan: Heusden, Asten, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jan van Heusden nació aproximadamente 1220, en Heusden, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos, su papá, Arnoud II heer van Heusden, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mechtild von Kleve-Heinsberg, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Aleidis van Arenberg. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 14 de octubre de 1268, en Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, a la edad de 49 años.
